mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO trade_data ( data_year_month, partner_code, partner_name, reg_code, reg_name, product_code, product_name, trade_mode_code, trade_mode_name, first_quantity, first_unit, second_quantity, second_unit, amount_rmb, remark, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.dataYearMonth}, #{item.partnerCode}, #{item.partnerName}, #{item.regCode}, #{item.regName}, #{item.productCode}, #{item.productName}, #{item.tradeModeCode}, #{item.tradeModeName}, #{item.firstQuantity}, #{item.firstUnit}, #{item.secondQuantity}, #{item.secondUnit}, #{item.amountRmb}, #{item.remark}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE partner_name = VALUES(partner_name), reg_code = VALUES(reg_code), reg_name = VALUES(reg_name), product_name = VALUES(product_name), trade_mode_name = VALUES(trade_mode_name), first_quantity = VALUES(first_quantity), first_unit = VALUES(first_unit), second_quantity = VALUES(second_quantity), second_unit = VALUES(second_unit), amount_rmb = VALUES(amount_rmb), remark = VALUES(remark), deleted = 0, update_time = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM trade_data WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount_rmb), 0) FROM trade_data WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT trade_mode_name AS tradeModeName, COUNT(1) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(amount_rmb), 0) AS totalAmount FROM trade_data WHERE deleted = 0 AND trade_mode_name IS NOT NULL AND trade_mode_name != '' GROUP BY trade_mode_name ORDER BY totalAmount DESC
SELECT trade_mode_name AS name, COUNT(1) AS value FROM trade_data WHERE deleted = 0 AND trade_mode_name IS NOT NULL AND trade_mode_name != '' GROUP BY trade_mode_name ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT partner_name AS name, COALESCE(SUM(amount_rmb), 0) AS value FROM trade_data WHERE deleted = 0 AND partner_name IS NOT NULL AND partner_name != '' GROUP BY partner_name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20
